This variable is only populated when beneficiary lives in an LTC facility (i.e., when the PTNT_RSDNC_CD 
variable equals 03). 

SHORT NAME: SUBMSN_CLR_CD 

LONG NAME: SUBMSN_CLR_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: 00 = (Unknown value — rarely populated) 
05 = Therapy change. Physician determined that a change in therapy was required – either the
